landing.heroTitle:
Manage your ATH Business
integrations like a pro
landing.heroSub: CobraHub is the all-in-one platform for agencies integrating ATH Business. CRM, projects, invoicing, and client portal — connected and automated.
landing.heroBadge: Built for agencies in Puerto Rico 🇵🇷
landing.heroNote: No credit card required. Free forever up to 3 clients.
landing.integrations: Integrates with the platforms you already use
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to get paid
landing.featuresSub: From first contact to monthly support.

crm.title: Client CRM
crm.desc: Full pipeline: prospect → in progress → completed → monthly support. Communication history and documents.

projects.title: Project Management
projects.desc: Auto-generated tasks by platform (WooCommerce, Shopify, custom). Real-time progress with delivery estimates.

invoicing.title: Smart Invoicing
invoicing.desc: Invoices with IVU tax, professional PDFs, payment tracking, auto-retainers, and payment reminders.

portal.title: Client Portal
portal.desc: Secure magic link access. Your clients see progress, upload files, and open tickets — with your branding.

dashboard.title: Dashboard & KPIs
dashboard.desc: 7 key metrics: revenue, active clients, projects, overdue tasks, revenue/client, avg time, and pipeline.

golive.title: Go-Live Checklist
golive.desc: Built-in checklist for every ATH Business integration: account, API keys, webhooks, sandbox, and production.

landing.pricingSub: Start free. Scale as you grow.

faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to get started?
faq.a1: No. The Free plan is completely free and doesn't require a credit card. You can manage up to 3 clients at no cost.
faq.q2: Can I change plans at any time?
faq.a2: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade anytime from your account settings. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.q3: Do my clients need to create an account?
faq.a3: No. Clients access the portal via a magic link you send by email. No password or account creation needed.
faq.q4: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq.a4: Your data is kept for 90 days after cancellation. You can export everything to CSV before canceling.
faq.q5: Does it work with any e-commerce platform?
faq.a5: Yes. CobraHub has templates for WooCommerce, Shopify, and custom platforms. Tasks are auto-generated based on the client's platform.

portal.noActiveProject: No active projects at this time.
